member.name: M:client.lib.screens.home.HomeViewModel.OnSearchTextChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.PropertyName
member.summary: Name of the Attached Property

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.IsNullable
member.summary: Should generate a nullable type for T

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.DefaultValue
member.summary: The default value for the property

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.DefaultBindingMode
member.summary: The BindingMode to use on SetBinding() if no BindingMode is given. Default is

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.ValidateValueMethodName
member.summary: Method name for to be run when a value is set. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.PropertyChangedMethodName
member.summary: Method name for to be run when a value has changed. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.PropertyChangingMethodName
member.summary: Method name for to be run when a value is set. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.CoerceValueMethodName
member.summary: Method name for used to coerce the range of a value. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.DefaultValueCreatorMethodName
member.summary: Method name for used to initialize default value for reference types. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.BindablePropertyXmlDocumentation
member.summary: Custom XML Comments added to BindableProperty
member.remarks: Must be the entire XML string, including ///

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.GetterMethodXmlDocumentation
member.summary: Custom XML Comments added to Get{PropertyName}(BindableProperty bindable)
member.remarks: Must be the entire XML string, including ///

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.SetterMethodXmlDocumentation
member.summary: Custom XML Comments added to Set{PropertyName}(BindableProperty bindable, T value)
member.remarks: Must be the entire XML string, including ///

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.BindablePropertyAccessibility
member.summary: The access modifier applied to the generated field

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.GetterAccessibility
member.summary: The access modifier applied to the generated method Get{PropertyName}(BindableProperty bindable)

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.SetterAccessibility
member.summary: The access modifier applied to the generated method Set{PropertyName}(BindableProperty bindable, T value)

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AccessModifier
member.summary: Used by CommunityToolkit.Maui source generators to define access modifiers for generated code

member.summary: Generates access modifier

member.summary: Generates access modifier

member.summary: Generates access modifier

member.name: F:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AccessModifier.None
member.summary: Generates no code
